x-enumeration-literals.name: Medical Examination / Medical Certification Check
x-enumeration-literals.description: Verification of cause of death, medical history, or attending doctor’s certificate.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Mortuary / Funeral Home Verification
x-enumeration-literals.description: Confirmation from funeral homes or mortuaries regarding the deceased’s identity and handling.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Repatriation Service Provider Check
x-enumeration-literals.description: Verification of international body transport services or repatriation documentation.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Death Registration / Civil Authority Check
x-enumeration-literals.description: Official government or registry validation of the death record.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Beneficiary / Identity Verification Agency
x-enumeration-literals.description: Independent validation of claimant identity, KYC, or beneficiary status.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Legal / Notary Verification
x-enumeration-literals.description: Validation from legal institutions or notaries for estate or inheritance-related claims.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Financial Institution Check
x-enumeration-literals.description: Verification with banks for payment account validation or deceased account status.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Forensic / Investigation Agency Check
x-enumeration-literals.description: Engaged in cases with suspicion of fraud or unclear circumstances.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Insurance Regulator / Reinsurer Consultation
x-enumeration-literals.description: External compliance or co-insurer validation for reinsurance or regulatory reporting.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Employer / Association Verification
x-enumeration-literals.description: External validation for group or employer-linked policies.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Document Authentication Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Third-party document authentication or certification check.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Law Enforcement / Coroner Check
x-enumeration-literals.description: In cases of unnatural or accidental death, external legal authority provides report.
